jobs.ai_meta_description: BPSSC ne 64 Havildar Clerk posts ke liye result aaj ki tarah announce kiya hai, 25 June 2026 ko result declare ho jayega.
jobs.ai_overview: Dosto, agar aap BPSSC me government job dhundh rahe hain toh yeh notification zaroor padhein. BPSSC ne total 64 posts ke liye recruitment process shuru kiya hai, jismein Havildar Clerk Home Guard ki post bhi hai.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: Seedha baat karte hain — competition kaafi tough hoga kyunki yeh posts state-wide recruitments hain. Agar aapka 10+2 intermediate exam pass hai aur aapki umar 24 se 50 ke beech hai, toh aapko ismein apply karne ka mauka milega. Havildar Clerk ki posts ke liye selection process 3 stages par hai — written test, physical test aur medical test.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Seedha bat karte hain — yeh posts only Bihar ke residents ke liye reserve hain. Agar aap Bihar ke resident hain aur aapka 10+2 intermediate exam pass hai, toh aapko ismein apply karne ka mauka milega. Agar aapka umar 24 se 50 ke beech hai, toh bhi aap apply kar sakte hain.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Form bharte waqt ek galti mat karna: apne details sabse pehle check karein aur phir apply karein. Physical test ke liye apne fitness ko improve karein. Written test ke liye apne study material ko proper prepare karein.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Salary ki baat karein toh in-hand roughly 30,000 se 40,000 rupaye tak hota hai. Agar aap daily duty allowance prapt karte hain, toh aapka in-hand salary 40,000 se 50,000 tak hota hai. Promotion ke baad salary 50,000 se 70,000 tak hota hai.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Dosto, yeh post aapko field mein kaam karne ka mauka degi. Aap Home Guard ke liye daily duty allowance prapt karsakte hain. Agar aapko physical test mein achha performance milta hai, toh aapko Havildar ki post prapt karne ka mauka milega.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Stage-wise strategy ke liye, phle written test mein focus karein. Iske baad physical test mein focus karein aur phir medical test mein focus karein. Agar aapko physical test mein achha performance milta hai, toh aapko final cut-out ke liye selected honge.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: Step-by-step 5-6 numbered steps ke liye: 1. BPSSC ke official website par jaayen. 2. Apply Online par click karein. 3. Apne details sabse pehle check karein aur phir apply karein. 4. Physical test ke liye apne fitness ko improve karein. 5. Written test ke liye apne study material ko proper prepare karein. 6. Medical test mein bhi achha performance karein.

jobs.ai_h1: UPPSC 1370 Technical Education Teacher Posts: 2021-2026 Sarkari Naukri Ki Taza Khabar!
jobs.ai_title: UPPSC Technical Education Teacher Recruitment 2021-2026
jobs.ai_meta_description: UPPSC 1370 Technical Education Teacher Posts, Online Apply 15 Sep 2021 to 12 Oct 2021
jobs.ai_overview: Dosto, Government of India ne UPPSC Technical Education Teacher Service Exam 2021 ke liye 1370 posts ki bharti ki hai. Yeh ek bada mauka hai aapke liye, kyonki competition kaafi tough hoga kyunki itne posts ke liye 15 lakh se zyada candidates aayenge.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: Seedha baat karte hain, competition kaafi tough hoga kyunki yeh ek Sarkari Naukri hai. Lekin kuch posts ki shiksha aur anubhav ke liye behtar hain. Jaise, Lecturer Physics, Lecturer Chemistry, aur Lecturer English. In posts ke liye aapke paas Ph.D. aur First Class at either Bachelors or Masters level ke sath 16 Year Experience hona chahiye.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Dosto, aapko 21-40 years ka age hona chahiye. Aapka education Ph.D. ya First Class at either Bachelors or Masters level se hona chahiye. Aapka anubhav 16 Year se adhik hona chahiye. Aapko Uttar Pradesh mein se hi hain.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Form bharte waqt ek galti mat karna: apne education aur anubhav ke documents carefully check karein. Physical test ke liye, apne health ko proper check karein. Vyaktigat interview ke liye, apne communication skills par focus karein.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Salary ki baat karein toh in-hand roughly 55,000 - 65,000 rupaye hain. DA/HRA ka koi jankari nahi di gayi hai, lekin aapko lagta hai ki yeh bahut hi achha hoga.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Dosto, yeh Technical Education Teacher ki job hai, jismein aapko school ke students ko padhai ke liye teach karna hoga. Yeh ek field job hai, jismein aapko bahut hi achha salary aur facilities milenge.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Selection process me, aapko written exam, interview, aur physical test ka phase hoga. Written exam me, aapko science aur education ke topics par questions aayenge. Interview me, aapko apne communication skills aur experience ke liye questions aayenge. Physical test me, aapko apne fitness ke liye test hoga.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: 1. UPPSC official website par jayein aur apply online button par click karein. 2. Registration form bharne ke liye, apne mobile number aur email id enter karein. 3. Apne education aur experience ke documents upload karein. 4. Payment mode select karein. 5. Submit button par click karein. 6. Apne application status check karein.

ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Nai, aapka age 40 years se adhik hai, toh aap is job ke liye apply nahin kar sakte hain.

ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Hai, aap Uttar Pradesh se hain, toh aap is job ke liye apply kar sakte hain.

jobs.ai_meta_description: Dosto, RBI Officer Grade B Recruitment 2026 Result announced. Apply online before 20/05/2026. 60 posts available.
jobs.ai_overview: Dosto, agar aap RBI me government job dhundh rahe hain toh yeh notification zaroor padhein. RBI ne 60 posts ke liye Officer Grade B ke liye notification issue ki hai. Aap 20/05/2026 tak online apply kar sakte hain.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: Seedha baat karte hain - competition kaafi tough hoga kyunki RBI ka reputation hai. Lekin kuch posts ki probability zyada hai, jaise DEPR aur DSIM. Yeh posts economics aur mathematics ke candidates ke liye acchi hai.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Aapko Bachelor Degree in Any Stream ke saath 60% marks hona chahiye. SC/ST candidates ke liye 50% marks hoga. Aapko 21-30 years ka age limit hoga. Only Indian citizens apply kar sakte hain.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Form bharte waqt ek galti mat karna: aapka mobile number aur email id sahi hona chahiye. Physical test ke liye, aapko apne aapko fit rakhna hoga. Preparation ke liye, aapko RBI ke previous year papers padhna hoga.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Salary ki baat karein toh in-hand roughly 50,000 - 60,000 rupaye hogi. Aapko DA/HRA milenga. Promotion path hai. Aapko 2-3 years ke baad Assistant Manager ban sakte hain.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Day-to-day work me aapko data analysis karna hoga, policy making karna hoga. Aapko field mein bhi jana hoga, jaise branch mein. Department culture is formal aur professional. Aapko apne aapko motivate rakhna hoga.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Stage-wise strategy is: first phase me aapko online exam clear karna hoga. Phir second phase me aapko interview karna hoga. Aapko both phase clear karna hoga. Aapko preparation ke liye 6-8 months ka time diya jaega.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: Step-by-step apply karna: 1. Online registration karein. 2. Application form fill karein. 3. Payment karein. 4. Documents upload karein. 5. Submit karein. Common mistakes: aapka mobile number aur email id sahi nahi ho. Documents sahi nahi upload huye hain.

ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Aapko Bachelor Degree in Any Stream ke saath 60% marks hona chahiye. SC/ST candidates ke liye 50% marks hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: RBI Officer Grade B ke liye kaise apply karein?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Online registration karein, application form fill karein, payment karein, documents upload karein aur submit karein.

jobs.ai_overview: Dosto, SSC ne 1731 posts ke liye Junior Engineer ki recruitment ki hai. Yeh joobs Civil, Electrical, Mechanical fields me hain. Apply online karne ki last date 21/07/2025 hai. Yeh joobs ek bahut hi achhi opportunity hai engineers ke liye.

Civil ke liye BE/B.Tech degree ya 2 year experience ke sath Diploma in related trade ka eligibility hai. Electrical aur Mechanical ke liye bhi aisa hi. Yeh posts mehnat aur dedication ke liye best hain.

jobs.ai_salary_insights: Salary ki baat karein toh in-hand roughly 40,000 - 55,000 rupaye honge. DA/HRA ka bhi allowance hoga. Promotion ke liye aapko 4-5 years ka experience hona hoga.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Yeh joobs ka day-to-day work field mein hota hai. Aapko project management, design, construction ke liye kaam karna hoga. Yeh posts mehnat aur dedication ke liye best hain.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Stage-wise strategy is ki aapko initial screening pass karne ke liye online test clear karna hoga. Phir written test hai, jismein aapko technical questions ka answer dene honge. Physical test ka bhi exam hoga, jismein aapko fitness ka test karna hoga.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite:
Step-by-step 5-6 numbered steps:
   1. SSC ka official website par visit karein.
   2. Online application form fill karein.
   3. Form meh aapka email id aur mobile number daalein.
   4. Physical test ke liye aapko fit hona hoga.

   6. Documents checklist: aapka marksheet, degree, age proof, id proof, etc.

jobs.ai_meta_description: UPPSC Staff Nurse Recruitment 2023 - Online applications invited for 2240 posts. Last Date to Apply: 29/09/2023
jobs.ai_overview: Dosto, agar aap UPPSC Staff Nurse Recruitment 2023 me participate karna chahte hain toh zaroor padhein. UPPSC ne 2240 posts ke liye online aavedan janvaaya hai. Aapko 21/08/2023 se 29/09/2023 tak online aavedan karne honge.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: Seedha baat karte hain, competition kaafi tough hoga kyunki yeh 2240 posts hai. Staff Nurse Male aur Female dono posts hain. Agar aapka focus hai General Nursing aur Midwifery par toh aapko is post ke liye kaafi chances milegi.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Dosto, agar aap 21-40 varsh ka hain aur Class 10th Science aur 10+2 Intermediate Exam se pass hain, aur aapka Diploma in General Nursing aur Midwifery hai, toh aap is post ke liye apply kar sakte hain. Agar aap Uttar Pradesh ke residents hain toh aapko is post ke liye apply karne ka fayda milega.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Form bharte waqt ek galti mat karna: aapko apne Diploma in General Nursing aur Midwifery ka certificate aur other documents saath jodkar submit karna hoga. Physical test tips: agar aapko physical test ka bhagidari hogi, toh aapko apne physical fitness ko banaye rakhna hoga. Exam preparation ke liye aapko 10+2 Intermediate Exam aur Nursing ke liye padhe rakhna hoga.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Salary ki baat karein toh in-hand roughly 20,700 - 50,700 rupaye per month hogi. DA/HRA aur other allowances hain, lekin exact number ki jaankari abhi available nahi hai.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Day-to-day work: aapko hospital ya nursing home mein staff nurse ke roop mein kaam karna hoga. Field ya desk ka kis tarah ka karyakram hai, ye depend karta hai apne posting ke upar. Department culture: aapko apne colleagues aur seniors ke saath accha rehitana hoga. Real picture: aapko apne patients ke saath accha treatment karana hoga aur apne duty ko puri tarah se poora karna hoga.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Stage-wise strategy: pehle aapko online aavedan form bharna hoga, fir physical test (agar uplabdh ho) aur fir interview. Which sections to focus on: aapko apne nursing skills aur knowledge par focus karna hoga.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite:
Step-by-step 6 numbered steps:
1. Aapko apne documents ready karke online aavedan form par submit karna hoga.
2. Form bharte waqt ek galti mat karna: aapko apne Diploma in General Nursing aur Midwifery ka certificate aur other documents saath jodkar submit karna hoga.
3. Aapko apne online aavedan form ko submit karne ka date 29/09/2023 fixed hai.
4. Aapko apne physical test ka bhagidari hogi (agar uplabdh ho).
5. Aapko apne exam preparation ke liye 10+2 Intermediate Exam aur Nursing ke liye padhe rakhna hoga.
6. Aapko apne selection strategy ka hisaab karna hoga: pehle aapko online aavedan form bharna hoga, fir physical test (agar uplabdh ho) aur fir interview.

jobs.ai_h1: RPSC Sub Inspector aur Subedar Recruitment 2025 mein 1015 posts ke liye tayar ho jao!
jobs.ai_title: RPSC Sub Inspector & Subedar Recruitment 2025 - 1015 Posts
jobs.ai_meta_description: RPSC 1015 posts ke liye Sub Inspector & Subedar Recruitment 2025 mein bhartiya hain. Apne apply karne ke liye 08/09/2025 tak taiyar ho jao.
jobs.ai_overview: Dosto, aaj RPSC aapko 1015 posts ke liye Sub Inspector aur Subedar Recruitment 2025 mein bhartiya karta hai. Yeh recruitment 2025 mein hoga aur aapko online apply karne ka mauka milega.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: Seedha baat karte hain - competition kaafi tough hoga kyunki yeh recruitment 2025 mein hoga aur aapko online apply karne ka mauka milega. Sabse acchi chances woh candidates ke paas honge jo apne preparation ke liye taiyar hain.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Dosto, agar aap 20-25 age ka hain aur Bachelor's Degree se graduate hain, to aap is recruitment ke liye apply kar sakte hain. Aapko working knowledge of Hindi (Devnagri Script) aur Rajasthani ke bare mein bhi jaankaari honi chahiye. Lekin yeh yaad rakhein ki yeh recruitment Rajasthan ke liye hai, isliye aapko Rajasthan ke resident card ke saath apply karne ka mauka milega.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Form bharte waqt ek galti mat karna: aapka application number aur password dhyaan se rakhein. Yeh dono information aapke admit card aur result mein bhi use honge. Physical test ke liye taiyar ho jao, kyonki yeh test hoga aur aapko pass karne ke liye taiyar hona hoga.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Salary ki baat karein toh in-hand roughly 35,400 rupaye honge. 21700 - 69100 pay scale hai aur aapko DA, HRA, TA, Medical Allowance aur Other Allowances bhi milega. Promotion path ke liye taiyar ho jao, kyonki yeh recruitment future ke liye bhi aapko taiyar karne ka mauka dega.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Dosto, yeh Sub Inspector aur Subedar recruitment kaam ki jaankaari de raha hai. Aapko field mein kaam karna hoga aur aapko Rajasthani language aur Rajasthani culture ke bare mein bhi jaankaari honi chahiye. Yeh recruitment Rajasthan Police ke liye hai, isliye aapko Rajasthan Police ke department culture ke bare mein bhi jaankaari honi chahiye.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Selection process mein stage-wise strategy ki zaroorat hai. Aapko written test, physical test aur medical test clear karne ke liye taiyar ho jao. Yeh recruitment ke selection process ke hisaab se aapko apne preparation ke liye taiyar hona hoga.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite:
Step-by-step 5-6 numbered steps:

1. RPSC ka official website par visit karein aur apply online button par click karein.
2. Aapka application form online submit karne ke liye taiyar ho jao.
3. Aapka application fee online payment karne ki jaankaari rakhein.
4. Aapka admit card online download karne ke liye taiyar ho jao.
5. Aapka result online check karne ke liye taiyar ho jao.
6. Yeh yaad rakhein ki aapko apne apply karne ke liye 08/09/2025 tak taiyar ho jana hoga.

Yeh tips aapko apply karne mein madad karenge, lekin yeh yaad rakhein ki yeh recruitment 2025 mein hoga aur aapko online apply karne ka mauka milega.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Maine online apply karna shuru kiya tha, lekin mera application number aur password kahan hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Aapko aapka application number aur password aapke mobile number par SMS aur aapke email par mail ki jaayegi. Yeh information aapka application form ka print aur aapka admit card mein bhi use hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Maine physical test clear kar liya hai, lekin mera medical test kaise hoga?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Aapka medical test ek alag stage hai. Yeh test aapko apne physical test ke baad clear karne honge. Aapko apne medical test ke liye taiyar hona hoga, kyonki yeh test aapke selection process ka hisaab hai.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Maine apply kiya hai, lekin mera admit card kahan hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Aapka admit card online download karne ke liye taiyar ho jao. Aapka admit card aapke application form ka print aur aapka application number aur password ke saath use hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Maine online apply kiya hai, lekin mera result kahan hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Aapka result online check karne ke liye taiyar ho jao. Aapka result aapke application number aur password ke saath use hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Maine 08/09/2025 ke baad apply kiya hai, to main kya kar sakta hoon?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Dosto, yeh yaad rakhein ki yeh recruitment 2025 mein hoga aur aapko online apply karne ka mauka milega. Agar aap 08/09/2025 ke baad apply karte hain, to aapka application form reject ho jayega. Isliye, yeh yaad rakhein ki aapko apne apply karne ke liye 08/09/2025 tak taiyar hona hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Maine apne application form mein koi galti kar di hai, to main kya kar sakta hoon?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Dosto, yeh yaad rakhein ki aapka application form online submit hone ke baad galti mat karein. Agar aapne apne application form mein koi galti kar di hai, to aapko apne application form ko fir se submit karne ke liye taiyar hona hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Maine apne result ko check kar liya hai, lekin mera name kahan hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Dosto, yeh yaad rakhein ki aapka result online check karne ke liye taiyar ho jao. Aapka result aapke application number aur password ke saath use hoga. Agar aapka name result mein hai, to aapko apne interview ke liye taiyar hona hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Maine apne interview ko clear kar liya hai, lekin mera selection kahan hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Dosto, yeh yaad rakhein ki aapka selection process ka last stage interview hai. Agar aapka interview clear ho jata hai, to aapko final selection ke liye taiyar hona hoga.

jobs.ai_title: UP Polytechnic JEECUP 2026 Admissions: 3 Lakh Seats
jobs.ai_meta_description: UP Polytechnic JEECUP 2026: 3 lakh seats up for grabs in 19 groups. Last date to apply online is 10th May 2026.
jobs.ai_overview: Dosto, UP Polytechnic JEECUP 2026 me 3 lakh seats up for grabs hain. Isme 19 groups hain, jismein Diploma in Engineering se Fashion Designing tak sabhi courses shamil hain. Competition kaafi tough hoga kyunki yeh 3 lakh seats hain, lekin agar aapko yeh courses interest hain toh aapko yeh chance nahin hone dena chahiye.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: Seedha baat karte hain, competition kaafi tough hoga kyunki yeh 3 lakh seats hain. Lekin agar aapke paas PCM me 50% marks hain aur aap 14-19 age group mein hain toh aapko yeh chance mil sakta hai. Form fill karne ke liye aapko online mode se apply karna hoga aur aapko 300-200 fees deni hogi.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Agar aapko 10th pass hain aur aap PCM me 35% marks se zyada marks hain toh aap ismein apply kar sakte hain. Aapka age 14-19 ke beech hona chahiye. Agar aap 10+2 pass hain aur PCM me 50% marks hain toh bhi aap ismein apply kar sakte hain.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Form fill karne ke liye aapko 10th aur 12th marks sabhi ko yaad rakhein. PCM ke marks kaafi jaroori hain. Agar aap 10th aur 12th me PCM me zyada marks hain toh aapko yeh chance mil sakta hai.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Salary ki baat karein toh in-hand roughly 12,000-18,000 rupaye per month hoga. Agar aap 3-5 saal ke experience ke baad promotion lete hain toh aapka salary 25,000-35,000 rupaye per month hoga.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Dosto, yeh polytechnic diploma courses hain, jismein aapko kisi bhi course me join karke 3 saal ke liye diploma course complete karne ka mauka milega. Agar aapko fashion designing ya computer application me interest hai toh aap ismein apply kar sakte hain.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Stage-wise strategy ke liye seedha baat karte hain. Form fill karne ke baad aapko exam clear karna hoga, jiska date 2-9 June 2026 hoga. Agar aap exam clear karte hain toh aapko interview ke liye call milega.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite:
Step-by-step 5-6 numbered steps:
1. Jald se jald aapko online mode se apply karna hoga. Last date 10/05/2026 hai.
2. Form fill karne ke liye aapko 10th aur 12th marks sabhi ko yaad rakhein.
3. Agar aap form fill karne se pehle kisi bhi course ka eligibility check karte hain toh aapko yeh check karna hoga.
4. Form fill karne ke liye aapko online mode se apply karna hoga aur aapko 300-200 fees deni hogi.
5. Agar aap form fill karte hain toh aapko yeh confirm karna hoga ki aapka form sahi hai.
6. Agar aap form fill karte hain toh aapko yeh check karna hoga ki aapka form 09-11 May 2026 ke beech me correct ho jata hai ya nahin.
7. Agar aap form fill karte hain toh aapko yeh check karna hoga ki aapka admit card 27/05/2026 se pehle aapke paas milega ya nahin.
8. Agar aap form fill karte hain toh aapko yeh check karna hoga ki aapka result 19/06/2026 se pehle aapke paas milega ya nahin.

jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Age limit 18-26 hai aur ITI diploma ya certificate ke saath apply kar sakte hain. Electrician, Power Electrician, Wireman, Lineman, SBA, Electronics Mechanic, COPA, Technician-III (ITI) JVVN ke liye apply kar sakte hain. Rajasthan, Madhya Pradesh, Gujarat, Maharashtra, Chhattisgarh, Jharkhand, Bihar, Uttar Pradesh, Haryana, Delhi, Himachal Pradesh, Punjab, Uttarakhand, Jammu & Kashmir, Odisha, West Bengal, Assam, Meghalaya, Manipur, Mizoram, Nagaland, Andaman and Nicobar Islands, Chandigarh, Dadra and Nagar Haveli, Daman and Diu, Lakshadweep, Puducherry ke residents apply kar sakte hain.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Physical test ke liye, apne body ki fitness ko maintain karo. 3-4 kilometer ka running aur 1-2 kilometer ka walking zaroor practice karo. 3-4 sets of push-ups, sit-ups, squats zaroor practice karo. jobs.ai_salary_insights: Salary ki baat karein toh in-hand roughly 30,000 - 40,000 rupaye per month hoga. DA (Dearness Allowance) 18% aur HRA (House Rent Allowance) 8% hoga. jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Technician-III (ITI) ki job ka day-to-day work sub-station, transmission line, distribution line, power house, workshop, etc. mein hota hai. Field mein kaam karne ki jarurat hoti hai. Department culture achha hai, sabhi colleagues mein sahyog hota hai.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Selection process mein, written test, physical test, document verification, medical test, etc. shamil hain. Written test mein, 3-hour ka exam hota hai jismein 80% kiya gaya hai. Physical test mein, 3-4 kilometer ka running, 1-2 kilometer ka walking, 3-4 sets of push-ups, sit-ups, squats hota hai. Document verification mein, apne documents ki verification hoti hai. Medical test mein, apke sharir ke check-up hota hai.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite:
Apply karne ke liye, yeh steps follow karo:
1. 21 Feb 2025 se online apply karne ke liye website par visit karo.
2. Apne registration number aur password se login karo.
3. Application form fill karo aur documents upload karo.
4. Fee pay karo.
5. Submit karo.
Common mistakes avoid karo:
- Apne application form mein sahi information de.
- Apne documents ko sahi format mein upload karo.
- Apne fee ko sahi mode mein pay karo.
Documents checklist:
- Apne ITI diploma ya certificate.
- Apne age proof.
- Apne address proof.

jobs.shortInfo: Central Board of Secondary Education CBSE Central Board will soon release the results for the Class 10th Xth High School and Class 12th XIIth Intermediate Annual Board Exam 2026. The CBSE will declare the Secondary and Senior Secondary board Exam result April / May 2026. Candidates will be able to check their results/marks by entering their roll number on the official website. The official result date will be announced Soon. All registered students are advised to activate their DigiLocker accounts as soon as possible so that, once the results are released, they can receive their mark sheets and certificates in digital format via DigiLocker

additionalData.step_1: The student will get the link to do DigiLocker Account Confirmation in the Some Useful Important Links section at the bottom of this page.
additionalData.step_2_t: o confirm DigiLocker Account, the student has to first select his class such as X or XII.
additionalData.step_3: After that the student has to enter the code of his school. If the school code is not known, then they can see it in their admit card.
additionalData.step_4: After that the student has to enter his/her board exam roll number.
additionalData.step_5: After that Enter 6 Digit PIN provided by your school.
additionalData.step_6: After that the candidate has to enter his mobile number.
additionalData.step_7: An OTP will be received on the mobile number given by the student, he will have to enter it.
additionalData.step_8: DigiLocker Account Confirmation process will be completed.

jobs.ai_meta_description: CBSE Board 10th aur 12th Re-Evaluation me Bhag Lena, Last Date 15 April 2026, 0 Posts
jobs.ai_overview: Dosto, ye notification CBSE Board ke liye hai. 10th aur 12th ki re-evaluation result 15 April 2026 ko declare hoga. Agar aapke paas results mein koi galat hai, to aap re-evaluation ke liye apply kar sakte hain.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: Seedha baat karte hain — competition kaafi tough hoga kyunki kuch students results mein galat chitrok karke aayenge. Lekin, agar aapko aapke results mein koi galat hai, to aap re-evaluation ke liye apply kar sakte hain. Iske liye aapko Digilocker account activate karna hoga aur security pin se login karna hoga.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Agar aap CBSE Board ke under padhe hue hain aur aapke results mein koi galat hai, to aap re-evaluation ke liye apply kar sakte hain. Aapke age 18-30 years ke beech hona chahiye aur aapka Digilocker account active hona chaiye.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Form bharte waqt ek galti mat karna: apne results ki jankari se pehle hi check karein. Aur, agar aapko koi problem aati hai, to Digilocker ke customer care se contact karein.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Salary ki baat karein toh in-hand roughly 10,000 - 20,000 rupaye hai.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Day-to-day work aapke results ki verification aur correction ke liye hoga. Field mein kaam nahin hoga, balki aapka 90% time office mein bitaayega.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Stage-wise strategy ye hai: sabse pehle aapka Digilocker account activate karna hoga, phir aapko security pin se login karna hoga, aur phir aapke results ki verification aur correction ke liye apply karna hoga.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite:
Step-by-step steps ye hain:
1. Apne results ko Digilocker par check karein.
2. Agar aapko koi galat hai, to re-evaluation ke liye apply karein.
3. Aapko apne Digilocker account ko activate karna hoga.
4. Aapko security pin se login karna hoga.
5. Aapke results ki verification aur correction ke liye apply karein.
6. Aapko common mistakes ke liye jankari deni hogi, jaise ki apne results ka pehle se check karna aur Digilocker ke customer care se contact karna.
7. Aapko documents ke checklist deni hogi, jaise ki aapke results ki copy aur Digilocker account ki screenshot.
8. Aapko last date ka pata hona chahiye, jo ki 15 April 2026 hai.

ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Aap apne Digilocker account ki help se apni application ki status check kar sakte hain. Aap apne login ID aur password se login karke apni application ki status check kar sakte hain.

jobs.ai_title: DUVASU Mathura PVT Admissions 2026 Result: UG, PG aur Anya Course ke liye Check Karne ke Liye
jobs.ai_meta_description: UP Government ke DUVASU Mathura PVT Admissions 2026 Result aayi hai. Check karne ke liye aapko online form mein login karna hoga - last date 2026-06-15. {vacancy count} posts ke liye aapko apna mobile number aur password enter karna hoga.
jobs.ai_overview: Dosto, agar aap UP Government ke DUVASU Mathura me government job dhundh rahe hain toh yeh notification zaroor padhein. DUVASU Mathura ne {vacancy count} posts ke liye UG, PG, aur anya course ke liye admissions 2026 ki aayojit ki hai. Yeh ek bohot hi acchi opportunity hai aapko apne career ko badhane ke liye.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: Seedha baat karte hain - competition kaafi tough hoga kyunki yeh UP Government ki job hai. Lekin, agar aap apne preparation ke liye accha strategy follow karte hain, to aapko best chances milegi. UG course ke liye competition thoda kam hoga, lekin PG course ke liye competition kaafi zyada hoga.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Agar aap UP ke resident hain aur apne education qualification me eligibility hai, toh aap is job ke liye apply kar sakte hain. UG course ke liye, aapka age 18-25 years hona chahiye aur aapka education qualification 10+2 hona chahiye. PG course ke liye, aapka age 21-35 years hona chahiye aur aapka education qualification bachelor degree hona chahiye.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Form bharte waqt ek galti mat karna: apna mobile number aur password theek se enter karein. Physical test ke liye, aapko apne physical fitness ko maintain karna hoga. Yoga aur running ke liye aapko din mein kam se kam 1 hour time allocate karna hoga.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Salary ki baat karein toh in-hand roughly 45,000 - 60,000 rupaye hona hoga. DA aur HRA ke saath, aapka monthly salary 50,000 - 65,000 rupaye hona hoga. Promotion ke baad, aapka salary 70,000 - 80,000 rupaye hona hoga.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Job profile ke liye, aapko apne field mein kaam karna hoga. Department culture kaafi good hai. Aapko apne work mein focus karna hoga aur deadlines ko pura karna hoga.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Stage-wise strategy ke liye, aapko apne written test mein accha performance karna hoga. Physical test mein, aapko apne physical fitness ko show karna hoga. Interview mein, aapko apne communication skills ko show karna hoga.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite:
1. Online form mein registration karein.
2. Apna mobile number aur password enter karein.
3. UG aur PG course ke liye alag-alag form fill karein.
4. Apne documents upload karein.
5. Apne application fee pay karein.
6. Apne form submit karein.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Kya DUVASU Mathura PVT Admissions 2026 mein UG aur PG course ke liye separate form fill karna hoga?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haan, UG aur PG course ke liye alag-alag form fill karna hoga. Aapko apne education qualification aur course ke anusaar form fill karna hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Kya DUVASU Mathura PVT Admissions 2026 mein physical test hoga?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haan, physical test hoga. Aapko apne physical fitness ko maintain karna hoga aur physical test mein accha performance karna hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Kya DUVASU Mathura PVT Admissions 2026 mein interview hoga?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haan, interview hoga. Aapko apne communication skills ko show karna hoga aur interview mein accha performance karna hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Kya DUVASU Mathura PVT Admissions 2026 mein application fee hoga?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haan, application fee hoga. Aapko 2000 rupaye ka application fee pay karna hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Kya DUVASU Mathura PVT Admissions 2026 mein reservation hoga?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haan, reservation hoga. Aapko apne category ke anusaar reservation milegi.

ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haan, document upload karna hoga. Aapko apne education qualification aur experience ke documents upload karna hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haan, last date ki jaankari hoga. Aapko online form mein last date dikhayi jaegi.
